image_prompt: SVG: velocity-time graph of a migrating bird. x-axis Time / s (0 to 600, ticks every 100, minor 20), y-axis Velocity / m s⁻¹ (0 to 35, ticks every 5, minor 1). Trapezoidal motion through vertices A(0,0), B(100,30), C(450,30), D(550,0); teal straight segments with dot markers, vertices labelled A B C D. Distance C→D = ½·100·30 = 1500 m.

render_data.title: Sound waves recorded from four sources
render_data.concept: The time axis spans 1 s, so a trace's frequency equals its number of complete cycles. A = 10 Hz, B = 10 Hz, C = 6 Hz, D = 24 Hz. A and B share the same frequency (10 Hz); D (24 Hz) is the only wave above 20 Hz, so it is not infrasound.

render_data.title: Radioactive decay of krypton-85
render_data.yAxis: Average percentage of radioactive nuclei remaining / %

axis.y: Average percentage of radioactive nuclei remaining / %

image_prompt: SVG: same radioactive decay data as the Q8 stem (krypton-85), shown as a point-to-point joined line. x-axis Time / years (0 to 120, ticks every 20, minor 5), y-axis Average percentage of radioactive nuclei remaining / % (0 to 100, ticks every 20, minor 5). Teal line through × markers, exponential decay from 100% to ~0%, half-life ≈ 10.8 yr.
Original SVG illustration of a peregrine falcon (Falco peregrinus) in flight — clean copyright-safe style, white/blue background, Arial captions, contrasting natural colours.

SVG: four labelled force diagrams (Diagram 1–4) on a bird in flight, showing Lift (green ↑), Weight (brown ↓), Drag (blue ←), Thrust (red →). Diagram 1 balanced, Diagram 2 thrust>drag, Diagram 3 lift>weight, Diagram 4 weight>lift & drag>thrust. Original art, no IB material.

SVG showing infrasound diffraction around a barrier with blue/fin whales on opposite sides of an underwater mountain range (one source whale on right, group on far side), white wavefronts curving over the crest, dark arrows indicating direction on far side.
SVG: light ray refracting through three stacked transparent layers (top/middle/bottom). Yellow ray with arrowheads, dashed normals, dark backdrop. Middle layer densest.
SVG: tilted ebonite rod with net negative charge — green minus and red plus circles labelled, key in corner. White background.
SVG: Mia rubbing a balloon against her woollen jumper and small pieces of dry tissue paper attracted from a table, illustrating attraction by induction. White background, friendly colours.

SVG: five cups of different thicknesses on a baseline with two cm-scales (0/10/20 each side) — ribbed cardboard, ceramic mug with handle, tall blue mug, stainless tumbler, thick red mug. White background.
SVG: 2-column data table — Thickness / mm vs Time to cool from 78 °C to 52 °C / min (data rows 1/15, 3/22, 5/7, 5/18, 7/12). Header row blue, alternating row backgrounds, black border.

SVG mock-up of a radioactive decay simulator for caesium-137 (¹³⁷Cs → ¹³⁷Ba, half-life ≈ 30 years): purple nuclei field, day/year counter, progress bar, slider, playback controls, key with parent/daughter nuclei and beta particle.

SVG landscape: gas-fired power station on left (chimney, tanks/spheres, building), step-up transformer, three pylons with high-voltage wires, step-down transformer, utility pole, small house on the right. Sky and green ground.

topic: Transformer (laminated iron core, primary & secondary coils)
image_prompt: SVG: iron-core transformer with red primary windings (left limb) and blue secondary windings (right limb), green dashed flux loop arrows, labelled primary/secondary input/output, white background.
SVG: circular city map at 06:00 morning showing four quadrants alternately powered on/off, green parks, blue river meandering through feature, red road network, key for power-on/off.
SVG: isometric four-way intersection with grey asphalt roads, yellow & white lane markings, four traffic lights at corners, several coloured cars at the junction, green background.
SVG: run-of-river hydroelectric generator (small weir + waterwheel + generator unit) feeding a battery station which powers a traffic light. Original art, white-on-grey palette, labelled.
